author: Alvaro Mateo
description: Monitors folders for files added and runs custom actions based on user rules. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: Alvaro Mateo
manifest.description: Monitors folders for files added and runs custom actions based on user rules.
manifest.name: Folderer

name: Folderer

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## What's Changed
* feat: add actions "date move" and "property move" by @alvaromateo in https://github.com/alvaromateo/folderer/pull/1
* feat: add move attachments action by @alvaromateo in https://github.com/alvaromateo/folderer/pull/2
* test: integration testing by @alvaromateo in https://github.com/alvaromateo/folderer/pull/3
* docs: add how-to guides to documentation by @alvaromateo in https://github.com/alvaromateo/folderer/pull/5
* More integration tests by @alvaromateo in https://github.com/alvaromateo/folderer/pull/4

## New Contributors
* @alvaromateo made their first contribution in https://github.com/alvaromateo/folderer/pull/1

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/alvaromateo/folderer/commits/1.0.0
